title: Network Technician
description: Rippling is building the world's most powerful workforce platform. We're hiring a Network Technician to support our infrastructure and keep our systems running smoothly for thousands of companies. You'll work fully remote, troubleshooting network issues and implementing improvements that directly impact our product's reliability.
responsibilities: Monitor network infrastructure health and respond to connectivity issues and alerts
Troubleshoot network problems using diagnostic tools and follow systematic troubleshooting procedures
Maintain network documentation and update network diagrams and configurations
Support network security initiatives by implementing firewalls and access controls
Collaborate with infrastructure team on network upgrades and optimization projects
Provide technical support to remote employees regarding connectivity and network access

requirements.education: Associate's degree in IT or Network Administration; or equivalent hands-on experience
skills: Knowledge of networking fundamentals (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, routing)
Experience with network monitoring and diagnostic tools
Familiarity with firewall and router configuration
Basic Linux or Windows system administration
certifications: CompTIA Network+ or equivalent (preferred within 6 months)

benefits: Fully remote work with flexible scheduling
Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
Generous PTO and flexible time off
